fields.label: API Server URL
fields.helpText: Kubernetes API server URL (find with: kubectl cluster-info)

fields.label: Bearer Token
fields.helpText: Service account token (find with: kubectl create token <sa-name>)

healthcheck_config.description: Validates token via Kubernetes API versions endpoint

metadata.summary: Kubernetes container orchestration for managing clusters, pods, and deployments.
metadata.setup_guide:
1. Run: kubectl cluster-info (to get the API server URL)
2. Create a service account: kubectl create serviceaccount personas-sa
3. Bind a role: kubectl create clusterrolebinding personas-binding --clusterrole=view --serviceaccount=default:personas-sa
4. Generate a token: kubectl create token personas-sa
5. Paste the API server URL and token
